# connectracer_connect_integration_association (Resource)

Manages an AWS Connect Integration Association resource

Creates an integration association between an Amazon Connect instance and external services such as Wisdom knowledge bases, Q Connect, or other supported integrations.

Supported integration types include:
- `WISDOM_ASSISTANT`
- `WISDOM_KNOWLEDGE_BASE`
- `CASES_DOMAIN`
- `APPLICATION`
- `FILE_SCANNER`

## Example Usage

```terraform
# Example: Connect Integration Association with Wisdom Knowledge Base

# First, create a QConnect Knowledge Base
resource "connectracer_qconnect_knowledgebase" "example" {
  name                = "my-knowledge-base"
  knowledge_base_type = "CUSTOM"
  description         = "Knowledge base for customer support"

  tags = {
    Environment = "production"
    Team        = "customer-support"
  }
}

# Associate the knowledge base with a Connect instance
resource "connectracer_connect_integration_association" "kb_association" {
  instance_id      = "12eac4f3-e7d2-47f2-a2ac-f10753b6146c"
  integration_type = "WISDOM_KNOWLEDGE_BASE"
  integration_arn  = connectracer_qconnect_knowledgebase.example.knowledge_base_arn

  tags = {
    Environment = "production"
    Team        = "customer-support"
  }
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `instance_id` (String) The identifier of the Amazon Connect instance
- `integration_arn` (String) The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the integration. For WISDOM_ASSISTANT or WISDOM_KNOWLEDGE_BASE, this should be the ARN of the Wisdom assistant or knowledge base
- `integration_type` (String) The type of integration. Valid values: `WISDOM_ASSISTANT`, `WISDOM_KNOWLEDGE_BASE`, `CASES_DOMAIN`, `APPLICATION`, `FILE_SCANNER`

### Optional

- `source_application_name` (String) The name of the external application. Required for APPLICATION integration type
- `source_application_url` (String) The URL for the external application. Required for APPLICATION integration type
- `source_type` (String) The type of the data source. Valid values: `SALESFORCE`, `ZENDESK`, `CASES`
- `tags` (Map of String) Tags to apply to the integration association

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The identifier for the integration association (IntegrationAssociationId)
- `integration_association_arn` (String) The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the integration association
